name: Ember Spirit
description: Balance in all things. Xin, the Ember Spirit.

abilities.name: Immolation
abilities.description: The higher Xin's level, the greater the damage per second value. Radius: 200 (350). Damage per Second: 10 (20). Aura Linger Duration: 0.033. Damage per Second Increase: 1.

abilities.name: Searing Chains
abilities.description: Unleashes fiery bolas that wrap around nearby enemies, anchoring them in place and dealing damage each second. Search Radius: 400. Damage per Second: 100 (150). Duration: 1.25/1.75/2.25/2.75 (2.05/2.55/3.05/3.55). Cooldown: 13/12/11/10. Mana Cost: 80/90/100/110.

abilities.name: Sleight of Fist
abilities.description: The Sleight of Fist is more effective and deals more damage on enemy heroes. Cast Range: 650. Mark Radius: 250/350/450/550. Interval: 0.25. Instant Attack Factor: 1. Jump Interval: 0.25. Dash Duration: Varies. Cooldown: 13/11/9/7. Mana Cost: 60/65/70/75.

abilities.name: Flame Guard
abilities.description: Surrounds himself with a ring of fire that consumes incoming magic damage, absorbing a percentage of the damage taken. Damage to Barrier Factor: 0.7. Duration: 12/14/16/18. Damage Radius: 500. Damage per Second: 20/30/40/50 (40/60/80/100). Damage Duration: 12/14/16/18. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Cooldown: 65/80/95/110.

abilities.name: Activate Fire Remnant
abilities.description: Dashes out to all active Fire Remnants, destroying them and dealing damage in an area, and then moving to the next nearest Remnant. Cast Range: Global. Max Travel Speed: 1300. Min Travel Time: 0.4. Travel Damage Radius: 225. Landing Damage Radius: 450. Damage: 100/200/300. Cooldown: 100/125/150.

abilities.name: Fire Remnant
abilities.description: Increases cast range, remnant travel speed, and max charges. Cast Range: 1400 (3000). Move Speed to Remnant Speed Factor: 2.5 (5). Remnant Duration: 45. Enemy Death Radius: (400). Number of Remnants on Self-Death: (1). Mana Cost: 35.
